tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_library_py_installers.py tests/test_validate_library.py -q (post codex fix)

downstream_impacts: MCP catalog entries can now declare runtime_requirements.binaries in schema.
Installer real installs now fuzzy-resolve the requested main entry before dependency resolution and use the resolved canonical name for dependency traversal.
Runtime requirement checks use PATH lookup only and do not execute declared binaries.

Pair-loop iteration 1: schema runtime_requirements description now describes the installer PATH gate semantics; _check_runtime_requirements reads only the schema-canonical top-level runtime_requirements location (removed the untested metadata.library fallback).

Codex adversarial fix: _install_with_deps now preflights runtime_requirements over the FULL resolved install_order before installing any entry, so a missing binary on any dependency (not just the main entry) fails before any install/dependency mutation occurs (all-or-nothing dependency graph install).
